Liquidity, the difference between income and expenditure, is reflected in the development of the current account and is an important indicator of the financial development of the agricultural company. In addition, it is an indication to determine whether an agricultural entrepreneur can meet his financial obligations in the short term.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Show all authors. In this 'Stand of' we publish our liquidity expectations for the agricultural sectors. Liquidity, the difference between income and expenditure, is reflected in the development of the current account and is an important indicator of the financial development of the agricultural company. In addition, it is an indication to determine whether an agricultural entrepreneur can meet his financial obligations in the short term. Liquidity is emphatically different from the income of the farmer or gardener.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: In this 'Stand of' we publish our liquidity expectations for the agricultural sectors. Liquidity, the difference between income and expenditure, is reflected in the development of the current account and is an important indicator of the financial development of the agricultural company. In addition, it is an indication to determine whether an agricultural entrepreneur can meet his financial obligations in the short term. Liquidity is emphatically different from the income of the farmer or gardener. Yields in arable farming are under pressure.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Liquidity, the difference between income and expenditure, is reflected in the development of the current account and is an important indicator of the financial development of the agricultural company. In addition, it is an indication to determine whether an agricultural entrepreneur can meet his financial obligations in the short term. Liquidity is emphatically different from the income of the farmer or gardener. Yields in arable farming are under pressure. In the agricultural sector, yields will develop favorably in the first half of 2025, with the exception of arable farming, where prices of chip potatoes fell after a good start due to oversupply and stagnant sales.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: In addition, it is an indication to determine whether an agricultural entrepreneur can meet his financial obligations in the short term. Liquidity is emphatically different from the income of the farmer or gardener. Yields in arable farming are under pressure. In the agricultural sector, yields will develop favorably in the first half of 2025, with the exception of arable farming, where prices of chip potatoes fell after a good start due to oversupply and stagnant sales. In food horticulture, on the other hand, prices between the different products fluctuate widely, but due to higher production per hectare, yields are on average good.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Liquidity is emphatically different from the income of the farmer or gardener. Yields in arable farming are under pressure. In the agricultural sector, yields will develop favorably in the first half of 2025, with the exception of arable farming, where prices of chip potatoes fell after a good start due to oversupply and stagnant sales. In food horticulture, on the other hand, prices between the different products fluctuate widely, but due to higher production per hectare, yields are on average good. Floriculture also continues to grow, mainly driven by price increases; increase in supply is not expected until later this year. > “Yield prices, especially in animal sectors, are higher than average due to market tightness”.

text: Yields in arable farming are under pressure. In the agricultural sector, yields will develop favorably in the first half of 2025, with the exception of arable farming, where prices of chip potatoes fell after a good start due to oversupply and stagnant sales. In food horticulture, on the other hand, prices between the different products fluctuate widely, but due to higher production per hectare, yields are on average good. Floriculture also continues to grow, mainly driven by price increases; increase in supply is not expected until later this year. > “Yield prices, especially in animal sectors, are higher than average due to market tightness”. Melanie Murk.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: In the agricultural sector, yields will develop favorably in the first half of 2025, with the exception of arable farming, where prices of chip potatoes fell after a good start due to oversupply and stagnant sales. In food horticulture, on the other hand, prices between the different products fluctuate widely, but due to higher production per hectare, yields are on average good. Floriculture also continues to grow, mainly driven by price increases; increase in supply is not expected until later this year. > “Yield prices, especially in animal sectors, are higher than average due to market tightness”. Melanie Murk. Sector economist Agricultural and Food.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: In food horticulture, on the other hand, prices between the different products fluctuate widely, but due to higher production per hectare, yields are on average good. Floriculture also continues to grow, mainly driven by price increases; increase in supply is not expected until later this year. > “Yield prices, especially in animal sectors, are higher than average due to market tightness”. Melanie Murk. Sector economist Agricultural and Food. In many animal sectors, yields are very high due to tight market conditions.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Floriculture also continues to grow, mainly driven by price increases; increase in supply is not expected until later this year. > “Yield prices, especially in animal sectors, are higher than average due to market tightness”. Melanie Murk. Sector economist Agricultural and Food. In many animal sectors, yields are very high due to tight market conditions. This applies in particular to poultry farming, in both the laying and meat sectors.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Melanie Murk. Sector economist Agricultural and Food. In many animal sectors, yields are very high due to tight market conditions. This applies in particular to poultry farming, in both the laying and meat sectors. Calf farming and dairy farming also benefit from higher prices due to shortages in supply.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Sector economist Agricultural and Food. In many animal sectors, yields are very high due to tight market conditions. This applies in particular to poultry farming, in both the laying and meat sectors. Calf farming and dairy farming also benefit from higher prices due to shortages in supply. The yields for fattening pig companies are under some pressure due to international competition.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: In many animal sectors, yields are very high due to tight market conditions. This applies in particular to poultry farming, in both the laying and meat sectors. Calf farming and dairy farming also benefit from higher prices due to shortages in supply. The yields for fattening pig companies are under some pressure due to international competition. In addition, it is expected that Chinese import duties and the opening of the European market for American pork could have a disruptive effect.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: This applies in particular to poultry farming, in both the laying and meat sectors. Calf farming and dairy farming also benefit from higher prices due to shortages in supply. The yields for fattening pig companies are under some pressure due to international competition. In addition, it is expected that Chinese import duties and the opening of the European market for American pork could have a disruptive effect. In fisheries, fish volumes are sufficient to meet demand and prices are in line with 2024.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Calf farming and dairy farming also benefit from higher prices due to shortages in supply. The yields for fattening pig companies are under some pressure due to international competition. In addition, it is expected that Chinese import duties and the opening of the European market for American pork could have a disruptive effect. In fisheries, fish volumes are sufficient to meet demand and prices are in line with 2024. Costs remain high but are stabilizing somewhat.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: The yields for fattening pig companies are under some pressure due to international competition. In addition, it is expected that Chinese import duties and the opening of the European market for American pork could have a disruptive effect. In fisheries, fish volumes are sufficient to meet demand and prices are in line with 2024. Costs remain high but are stabilizing somewhat. After years of sky-high inflation, costs remain as high as ever.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: In addition, it is expected that Chinese import duties and the opening of the European market for American pork could have a disruptive effect. In fisheries, fish volumes are sufficient to meet demand and prices are in line with 2024. Costs remain high but are stabilizing somewhat. After years of sky-high inflation, costs remain as high as ever. Nevertheless, entrepreneurs experience some relief because a number of important items stabilize or decrease slightly, as shown in the graph below.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: In fisheries, fish volumes are sufficient to meet demand and prices are in line with 2024. Costs remain high but are stabilizing somewhat. After years of sky-high inflation, costs remain as high as ever. Nevertheless, entrepreneurs experience some relief because a number of important items stabilize or decrease slightly, as shown in the graph below. For example, after a small peak in early 2025, the prospects for the gas price are favorable for the long term based on the TTF future prices.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Costs remain high but are stabilizing somewhat. After years of sky-high inflation, costs remain as high as ever. Nevertheless, entrepreneurs experience some relief because a number of important items stabilize or decrease slightly, as shown in the graph below. For example, after a small peak in early 2025, the prospects for the gas price are favorable for the long term based on the TTF future prices. On average, feed costs have fallen slightly compared to 2024, due to a downward trend in raw material prices, such as wheat and soy.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: After years of sky-high inflation, costs remain as high as ever. Nevertheless, entrepreneurs experience some relief because a number of important items stabilize or decrease slightly, as shown in the graph below. For example, after a small peak in early 2025, the prospects for the gas price are favorable for the long term based on the TTF future prices. On average, feed costs have fallen slightly compared to 2024, due to a downward trend in raw material prices, such as wheat and soy. In addition, farmers were able to spread more liquid manure in the spring, the placement capacity was expanded and exports to Germany and France increased by 25 percent, which has moderated manure sales prices somewhat in 2025.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Nevertheless, entrepreneurs experience some relief because a number of important items stabilize or decrease slightly, as shown in the graph below. For example, after a small peak in early 2025, the prospects for the gas price are favorable for the long term based on the TTF future prices. On average, feed costs have fallen slightly compared to 2024, due to a downward trend in raw material prices, such as wheat and soy. In addition, farmers were able to spread more liquid manure in the spring, the placement capacity was expanded and exports to Germany and France increased by 25 percent, which has moderated manure sales prices somewhat in 2025. The deposit rate of the European Central Bank (ECB) is 2 percent (June 2025) lower than last year, which generally leads to lower financing costs for new short-term loans and loans with variable rates.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: For example, after a small peak in early 2025, the prospects for the gas price are favorable for the long term based on the TTF future prices. On average, feed costs have fallen slightly compared to 2024, due to a downward trend in raw material prices, such as wheat and soy. In addition, farmers were able to spread more liquid manure in the spring, the placement capacity was expanded and exports to Germany and France increased by 25 percent, which has moderated manure sales prices somewhat in 2025. The deposit rate of the European Central Bank (ECB) is 2 percent (June 2025) lower than last year, which generally leads to lower financing costs for new short-term loans and loans with variable rates. On the other hand, labor costs remain high, causing more and more entrepreneurs to look for alternatives such as automation or moving production.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: On average, feed costs have fallen slightly compared to 2024, due to a downward trend in raw material prices, such as wheat and soy. In addition, farmers were able to spread more liquid manure in the spring, the placement capacity was expanded and exports to Germany and France increased by 25 percent, which has moderated manure sales prices somewhat in 2025. The deposit rate of the European Central Bank (ECB) is 2 percent (June 2025) lower than last year, which generally leads to lower financing costs for new short-term loans and loans with variable rates. On the other hand, labor costs remain high, causing more and more entrepreneurs to look for alternatives such as automation or moving production. Fertilizer prices have actually risen further in 2025, partly because the European Parliament announced import duties on fertilizer from Russia and Belarus in January.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: In addition, farmers were able to spread more liquid manure in the spring, the placement capacity was expanded and exports to Germany and France increased by 25 percent, which has moderated manure sales prices somewhat in 2025. The deposit rate of the European Central Bank (ECB) is 2 percent (June 2025) lower than last year, which generally leads to lower financing costs for new short-term loans and loans with variable rates. On the other hand, labor costs remain high, causing more and more entrepreneurs to look for alternatives such as automation or moving production. Fertilizer prices have actually risen further in 2025, partly because the European Parliament announced import duties on fertilizer from Russia and Belarus in January. Predominantly positive liquidity development.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: The deposit rate of the European Central Bank (ECB) is 2 percent (June 2025) lower than last year, which generally leads to lower financing costs for new short-term loans and loans with variable rates. On the other hand, labor costs remain high, causing more and more entrepreneurs to look for alternatives such as automation or moving production. Fertilizer prices have actually risen further in 2025, partly because the European Parliament announced import duties on fertilizer from Russia and Belarus in January. Predominantly positive liquidity development. Given the favorable developments in revenues and stabilizing costs, we anticipate positive liquidity developments for the animal sectors for the remainder of 2025 and early 2026.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: On the other hand, labor costs remain high, causing more and more entrepreneurs to look for alternatives such as automation or moving production. Fertilizer prices have actually risen further in 2025, partly because the European Parliament announced import duties on fertilizer from Russia and Belarus in January. Predominantly positive liquidity development. Given the favorable developments in revenues and stabilizing costs, we anticipate positive liquidity developments for the animal sectors for the remainder of 2025 and early 2026. Good demand and a shrinking livestock population are particularly decisive in this regard.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Fertilizer prices have actually risen further in 2025, partly because the European Parliament announced import duties on fertilizer from Russia and Belarus in January. Predominantly positive liquidity development. Given the favorable developments in revenues and stabilizing costs, we anticipate positive liquidity developments for the animal sectors for the remainder of 2025 and early 2026. Good demand and a shrinking livestock population are particularly decisive in this regard. Poultry farmers stand out, they strengthen their liquidity position the most.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Predominantly positive liquidity development. Given the favorable developments in revenues and stabilizing costs, we anticipate positive liquidity developments for the animal sectors for the remainder of 2025 and early 2026. Good demand and a shrinking livestock population are particularly decisive in this regard. Poultry farmers stand out, they strengthen their liquidity position the most. The vegetable sectors are faced with volatile prices.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Given the favorable developments in revenues and stabilizing costs, we anticipate positive liquidity developments for the animal sectors for the remainder of 2025 and early 2026. Good demand and a shrinking livestock population are particularly decisive in this regard. Poultry farmers stand out, they strengthen their liquidity position the most. The vegetable sectors are faced with volatile prices. Floriculture is improving and food horticulture maintains its current liquidity position.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Good demand and a shrinking livestock population are particularly decisive in this regard. Poultry farmers stand out, they strengthen their liquidity position the most. The vegetable sectors are faced with volatile prices. Floriculture is improving and food horticulture maintains its current liquidity position. Arable farming, especially companies that depend on the free market, is having a difficult year due to sales problems for potatoes.

metadata.source_title: Stabilize costs in agriculture and horticulture

text: Poultry farmers stand out, they strengthen their liquidity position the most. The vegetable sectors are faced with volatile prices. Arable farming, especially companies that depend on the free market, is having a difficult year due to sales problems for potatoes. ABN AMRO assumes a deterioration in the liquidity position of arable farms.

text:
Floriculture is improving and food horticulture maintains its current liquidity position. Arable farming, especially companies that depend on the free market, is having a difficult year due to sales problems for potatoes.
